Goal 1 · myAibou Platform Owner & SME
Platform Owner · myAibou & Everyday AI
🤖
Go-To Authority on myAibou Repeatedly sought out as the organization's most knowledgeable resource on myAibou — colleagues and Learning Partners alike defer to Ethan's guidance on agents, governance, and safe AI usage.
🔧
Agent Builder Expert Leads live demonstrations of AI Agent creation, Agent Builder workflows, and advanced agent configurations — empowering others to build their own solutions.
🛡️
Data Governance & Safety Authority Provides definitive guidance on data boundaries, sensitive data handling, and responsible AI usage — peers explicitly defer to Ethan's judgment when governance questions arise.
🔄
Content Refresh & MCO EE Integration Drove platform adoption across MCO EE — expanding reach and refreshing enablement content to keep pace with platform evolution.

Goal 2 · Full Enablement Portfolio
Continuous, High-Volume Enablement Across Every Platform & Format
🎓
Digital Dexterity Level 2 — AI in Action (ILT) Led the core AI Agents, Agent Builder & advanced workflow modules with live hands-on demonstrations — Takeda's flagship AI adoption and implementation experience.
🕐
Champions Office Hours (Recurring, Global) Regular live sessions where Ethan drives adoption, troubleshoots platform issues, demonstrates workflows, and provides strategic AI implementation guidance — consistently packed with engaged global participants.
🌍
Digital Dexterity Live! — Multi-Day Events Facilitator, speaker, and session lead at Digital Dexterity Live events in Cambridge and Zurich — covering Collaboration 101, AI tool walkthroughs, and advanced demos.
👥
TLT Digital Dexterity Breakout Sessions Supported senior leader-level Digital Dexterity breakout sessions as the myAibou platform expert — guiding Takeda leadership through AI adoption, implementation pathways, and platform feature demonstrations.
Goal 2 · Champions Adoption
Building a Multiplying Force
ENABLING
CHAMPIONS
GLOBALLY
The Champions program isn't just a program — it's Ethan's force multiplier. By equipping Champions across APAC, EUCAN, and the Americas with the platform knowledge and implementation skills they need, each session Ethan runs creates ripples of adoption that extend far beyond the room.

THE SUN

Goal 3 · Operational Responsibility
How Ethan's Leadership Showed Up
📋
Named Point of Contact — Globally "If you have any questions, please reach out to [email protected]" — Ethan's name appeared on global confirmation emails as the designated contact for all attendee inquiries.
🎯
End-to-End Coordination Managed the operational complexity of a 24-hour virtual event across time zones — a role requiring precision, reliability, and deep institutional knowledge.
🤝
Champions Showcase Integration Wove Champions program visibility into the global conference — showcasing peer implementation work and amplifying platform adoption wins to the broadest possible audience.
🌐
Cross-Regional Content Coherence Ensured messaging, tone, and AI enablement themes stayed consistent across APAC, EUCAN, and Americas tracks — a unified experience despite 24 hours of continuous delivery.

Goal 4 · Cambridge
Cambridge, Massachusetts · Digital Dexterity Live
🇺🇸
CAMBRIDGE
Ethan was the primary administrator of Digital Dexterity Live Cambridge — responsible for end-to-end event coordination including enablement design, subject matter expert sourcing, and alignment with HR and Communications partners to ensure flawless execution.

Beyond logistics, he stepped onto the stage himself — delivering Collaboration 101 and co-leading multi-day learning tracks as a session facilitator.
📋
Primary platform event owner — full coordination of enablement design, subject matter experts, HR, and Communications partners
Digital Dexterity Live Cambridge · Event Administration
🎙️
Also served as session lead — delivering Collaboration 101 and facilitating multi-day learning tracks in addition to administrative duties
Formal Event Agenda · Digital Dexterity Live Cambridge
👥
Coordinated subject matter experts and virtual facilitators including Mike Gilronan and Melinda Berry — ensuring the right expertise was in the room
DD Session Facilitation · Email Correspondence
Goal 4 · Zurich
Switzerland · Digital Dexterity Live
🇨🇭
ZURICH
Ethan served as primary administrator of Digital Dexterity Live Zurich — coordinating the full event infrastructure including enablement design, subject matter expert scheduling, and partnership with HR and Communications to drive attendance and adoption.

As with Cambridge, he also stepped in front of the room — presenting the Collaboration Beginner track and ensuring attendees left with practical, actionable skills.
📋
Primary platform event owner — full ownership of enablement design, SME coordination, HR & Communications alignment
Digital Dexterity Live Zurich · Event Administration
🎙️
Collaboration Beginner — Named Presenter, while simultaneously managing event operations behind the scenes
Formal Event Agenda · Digital Dexterity Live Zurich
📅
Sustained presence across the full multi-day schedule — demonstrating commitment to both administration and on-stage delivery
FW: Registration DD Zurich · Email Records
Goal 4 · Tokyo
Japan · Digital Dexterity Day — October
🇯🇵
TOKYO
Ethan served as primary administrator for Digital Dexterity Day Tokyo — the third flagship event he owned end-to-end in 2025. He designed the enablement framework, secured and briefed subject matter experts, and partnered with HR and Communications to drive the event to successful delivery.

Managing three flagship in-person platform events in a single year — across two continents — is a testament to Ethan's operational capacity alongside his role as an enablement leader and presenter.
🗼
Digital Dexterity Day
October 2025 · Tokyo, Japan

Amplifier Effect · The Broader Picture
Why Ethan's Work Matters Beyond the Metrics
THE ETHAN EFFECT
Every person he teaches becomes a multiplier themselves
🎯
He Recognizes His Team
Colleagues specifically praised that Ethan used his platform to elevate others — recognizing his DDT teammates publicly during his presentation. A leader who amplifies people around him.
🚀
He Generates Excitement
Audience members don't just learn from Ethan — they leave energized. Colleagues immediately request follow-ups, want ESB agent access, and start thinking bigger about what AI can do for them.
🔄
He Creates Lasting Behavior Change
The goal of digital dexterity enablement isn't attendance — it's changed behavior and platform adoption. The volume of re-engagement requests from previous participants signals Ethan's sessions actually move the needle.
🌍
He Crosses Every Boundary
Geography, seniority, function — Ethan has shown up for TLT leaders, frontline employees, global Champions, and learning partners alike. His impact is truly organization-wide.
Additional Achievement · Microsoft Amplify
Beyond the Four Goals
MICROSOFT
AMPLIFY
In addition to achieving all four annual goals, Ethan contributed to Takeda's adoption of Microsoft Amplify — integrating it as part of the broader digital enablement and adoption platform ecosystem.

This work supported the goal of automating and scaling AI enablement, providing an additional platform channel for Takeda employees to drive self-directed adoption at their own pace.
📡
Integrated Microsoft Amplify as a scalable platform channel to complement live enablement sessions and broaden adoption reach
Goal 1 · Automate & Scale AI Enablement
🔗
Amplify work extended the platform enablement model beyond live sessions — enabling asynchronous AI adoption across all regions
Digital People Experience · DD&T Initiative
➕
An additional accomplishment on top of four delivered goals — demonstrating consistent initiative beyond what was asked

⭐ Formal Recommendation · 2025
RECOMMEND
FOR RECOGNITION
Ethan Baird exceeded expectations across all four goals in 2025. He delivered 100+ enablement touchpoints, led a 24-hour global conference, served as primary administrator and presenter at flagship in-person events in Cambridge, Zurich, and Tokyo — owning enablement design, SMEs, HR, and Communications partners for each, and built automation workflows that positioned Takeda as a genuinely AI-forward organization.

Beyond the goals, Ethan acts as an organizational amplifier — elevating every person he trains, championing his teammates, and creating the kind of lasting capability change that can't be measured in session counts alone.

This is what exceptional performance looks like.
⭐ EXCEPTIONAL PERFORMANCE · 2025
